story-0034-0001.notes: Story text reconciliations: 15 tests not 14, 18 YAMLs not 17, FileCategorizer workflows fall-through documented. RULE-003 mitigation explicit in TASK-005. BREAKING CHANGE commit in TASK-003.

PlanTemplates/EpicReport assemblers stopped dual-targeting .github/templates/. Goldens regenerated. 95 .github/workflows/ preserved (RULE-003). PR #274 OPEN awaiting review.

Manifest regeneration deferred to TASK-006 or story 0005. Largest single-story golden deletion: 2944 files.

Linear sequential tasks 001→002→003→004, zero parallelism. PlatformFilter reserved for story 0004. SCOPE REDUCED POST-STORY-0002: golden .agents/ + AGENTS.md already removed via forward-migration. Residual work: AssemblerTarget.CODEX_AGENTS enum entry + any orphan references + residual test assertions. TASK-003 golden deletion is a no-op.
